name: Justa Healer

sheet.name: Justa Healer
sheet.background_story:
I am Justa Healer, a local healer for the people of this world. A healer's daily activities include the responsibility for providing regular medical care for their patients. The healer is the first point of contact for many patients and as a result must be able to diagnose a wide range of illnesses and injuries. Healers are also responsible for preventative care for their patients, including regular exams and leechings as indicated.

…my Job is to make sure people are able to live their life, but this world…

Why does death need to be the only constant?
